displayName: Azure Static Web Apps should follow CAF naming convention (stapp- prefix)
description: Requires Azure Static Web Apps to have names starting with 'stapp-', the abbreviation recommended by the Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework. Set the effect to Deny to block non-compliant resources, or Audit to report them without blocking. The prefix check is case-insensitive.

metadata.description: Audit logs a compliance warning without blocking; Deny blocks the request; Disabled turns the policy off.
